active_target.live_context_source: none — no live context file provided

extraction_analysis.attacker_gain: unknown — no selector or logic basis
extraction_analysis.victim_or_protocol_loss: unknown — pool vs. custody pattern not determined
extraction_analysis.why_gain_exceeds_entitlement: cannot be assessed without at least one confirmed public value-moving selector

gate_question: Does this exact current protocol, with current live state, allow an unprivileged attacker to extract funds or rewards beyond entitlement?
live_preconditions: Bytecode decompilation output (Heimdall, Panoramix, or 4byte lookup) must be present and must reveal at least one public selector that moves, releases, claims, or redeems value without caller validation.
Proxy slot check (EIP-1967 slot 0x360894a...) must be resolved; if a proxy, implementation bytecode must also be decompiled.
Deployer address and creation transaction must be identified to assess privileged selector retention.
Token balance breakdown must confirm live user-deposited or pooled value is still present at time of proof attempt.
Inbound/outbound transaction history must confirm whether funds arrived from many depositors (pool pattern) or a single funder (custody/escrow), determining whether third-party user value is at risk.
rejection_reason: Six hard gates fail simultaneously. verified_source is null; no ABI, no decompilation output, and no selector list were provided in the candidate brief or live context. exact_code_path_or_selector_exists is false because no function signature has been identified. attacker_controls_trigger is false because no public entry point is known. concrete_fund_or_reward_gain and gain_is_beyond_entitlement are both false because no call sequence can be constructed. live_state_supports_preconditions is false because no live context file was supplied. The $28.7M balance and balance_spike tags are necessary but not sufficient: HUNT_PLAN.md §Evidence Required demands exact entrypoints that move funds, an entitlement calculation, and an attacker gain calculation before promotion. None of those exist here. Re-submit after completing the five live-context pulls specified in the triage output: bytecode decompilation, proxy slot resolution, deployer identification, token balance enumeration, and transaction history review.
